\"Yeah... I was just being teased by som: "Yeah... I was just being teased by some of the kids on Route 1.
They told me that Hapi wasn't ever going: They told me that Hapi wasn't ever going to evolve with a trainer like me raising it...
I'm just wondering... if it's really oka: I'm just wondering... if it's really okay for me to have a Pokémon? Am I really up to the task?
I dunno, the other kids make it seem so: I dunno, the other kids make it seem so easy. I'll get over it probably. Don't worry about it. - Melia"
"Now, now. Perfection comes with time. You're still new and you have a lot to learn.
But that doesn't mean you're not doing a: But that doesn't mean you're not doing a good job already!
When I was small, it took me 3 years for: When I was small, it took me 3 years for my Klink to evolve fully into Klinklang.  These things just take time. Believe in yourself.
Whenever you think you're alone, just re: Whenever you think you're alone, just remember that I'm your #1 fan and I'm always rooting for you! :0] - Jenner!"
\"You're such a drama queen, you know th: "You're such a drama queen, you know that?? But I appreciate your words a lot. I won't lose hope again. Love you, Dad. - Melia"
\"P.S. Where did you put my audition CD?: "P.S. Where did you put my audition CD? It was on the table, but now I can't find it...
\"Oh right... It fell on the floor so I: "Oh right... It fell on the floor so I picked it up and placed it inside the wardrobe. - Jenner"
